experts.quote: Understanding what dramatically reduces stuttering during singing may eventually help us understand stuttering better.
experts.author: Barry Guitar
experts.role: Ph.D., Professor of Communication Sciences and Disorders, University of Vermont
experts.publication: Stuttering Foundation, 'Singing and Stuttering: What We Know'

experts.quote: The brain controls the mouth, so if the brain is telling the mouth to do something different then I suppose this could be one of the reasons why we don't stutter when we sing.
experts.author: Voon Pang
experts.role: Speech Language Therapist, Stuttering Treatment and Research Trust (START)
experts.publication: Stuttering Treatment and Research Trust, 'Why don't we stutter when we sing?'

experts.quote: I think one of the most important aspects of our work is that it shows that stuttering, at its source, is a biological problem. In the future, we may be able to build on what we've learned about the genetics of stuttering to develop novel diagnostics and therapies.
experts.author: Dennis Drayna
experts.role: Ph.D., Scientist Emeritus, NIH National Institute on Deafness and Other Communication Disorders

experts.quote: Stuttering has been recognized since the dawn of history and occurs across every culture and language, yet we still have no FDA-approved treatments. It is not an anxiety disorder, though social anxiety often accompanies it, and we must focus on addressing the underlying neurologic condition.
experts.author: Gerald Maguire
experts.role: M.D., Chair of Psychiatry and Neuroscience, UC Riverside School of Medicine

celebrities.quote: I had a stammer. And the only time it went away was when I sang. One day, my mother said to me, 'Don't speak it, sing it.' And that's what I did.
celebrities.name: Carly Simon

celebrities.quote: My mother taught me how to speak with rhythm, which is what I tell a lot of the stutterers that I come into contact with now.
celebrities.name: Carly Simon

celebrities.quote: I learned every word of it back to front by the time I was 10. And he raps very fast and very melodically and very percussively and it helped me get rid of the stutter.
celebrities.name: Ed Sheeran
celebrities.publication: ABC News, 'How Eminem Helped Ed Sheeran Overcome Stuttering'

celebrities.quote: A stutter can be like a straitjacket. I struggled with vowels, so 'Emily' was like the depths of hell for me.
celebrities.name: Emily Blunt
celebrities.publication: NPR, 'Desperate To Speak: How Emily Blunt Found Her Voice'

celebrities.quote: I never had professional therapy, but a couple of nuns taught me to put a cadence to my speaking, and that's why I spent so much time reading poetry – Emerson and Yeats.
celebrities.name: Joe Biden

celebrities.quote: Denzel stuttered. James Earl Jones stuttered. There are still days when I have my n-n-n days or r-r-r days. I try to find another word.
celebrities.name: Samuel L. Jackson
celebrities.publication: Stuttering Foundation (citing The New York Times)

celebrities.quote: I had a terrible stutter. But then I did some theater in high school and when I memorized words, I didn't stutter, which was just miraculous.
celebrities.name: Bruce Willis
celebrities.publication: Stuttering Foundation, 'Bruce Willis - Look Who's Talking'

celebrities.quote: I also stuttered as a child and I would talk to my dog and he would sit there and listen until he fell asleep. I also took a class for two years to help me, and I finally learned to stop.
celebrities.name: Tiger Woods
